What tier are you in now? 👀

Drop your Week 11 update below.
#SoDEX #SoPoints

Notice the bell in the top-right?             

Everyone has a letter waiting. Most are the same. A few are not.  

Open yours. Drop the screenshot below 👇 — let's see who got the quiet one.  #SoDEXDrops #SoDEX

New to SoDEX vault deposits?

Deposit MAG7.ssi → LP the SoDEX perp DEX → earn spreads, funding & liquidations.

Before you sign:
→ MAG7.ssi/sMAG7.ssi, on ValueChain
→ You'll get sMAG7.SLP 1:1 as your vault share
→ One signature covers the full flow
→ Withdrawals unlock after 14 days

🎥 SoDEX 101 · Deposit to Vault ↓ #SoDEX101 #SoDEX
